name: GMass Gmail Mass Email API
what_it_does: Gmail-native mass email and mail merge platform with API — enabling high-volume personalized email campaigns directly from Gmail accounts, with automatic follow-up sequences, email verification, open/click tracking, unsubscribe handling, and Google Sheets mail merge integration.
use_cases: Sending personalized mass email campaigns via Gmail at scale using mail merge
Managing automated follow-up sequences triggered by email engagement via API
Querying campaign analytics (opens, clicks, replies, bounces) for reporting dashboards
Integrating GMass with Google Sheets for dynamic recipient list management
Verifying email addresses before campaign sends to improve deliverability
not_for: Transactional email with programmatic SMTP (use Postmark or SendGrid)
Multi-channel outreach with LinkedIn and phone (use Outreach or Salesloft)
best_when: A small to mid-size team wants to run personalized email campaigns at scale directly from Gmail with Google Sheets as the data source, without moving to a separate email platform.
avoid_when: You need Outlook support, advanced CRM-driven sequences, multi-channel outreach, or sending from multiple email providers simultaneously.

auth.notes: API key from GMass account. Passed as api_key query parameter or Authorization header. Account-scoped. Gmail OAuth required for email sending. Webhook for campaign events (open, click, reply, bounce, unsubscribe). Google Sheets integration via separate OAuth.

pricing.notes: Chicago-based bootstrapped company. Founded 2015. No VC funding — profitable indie product. Very low price point differentiator. Per-Gmail-account pricing model. Gmail API integration for true Gmail sending (not SMTP relay). Google Sheets mail merge native. Email verification built-in. Popular with solopreneurs and small agencies.

performance.rate_limits: Gmail API limits apply (500 emails/day standard, 2000/day Google Workspace)

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for campaigns, analytics, and contacts. API key auth. Moderate developer documentation. Gmail API rate limits are hard ceiling — plan campaigns accordingly. Google Sheets integration is data source, not API-driven. Webhook for campaign events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Campaign reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by campaign. Contact reads idempotent. Campaign creation is not idempotent — check for duplicate campaigns before creating.
known_agent_gotchas: Gmail API limits: 500/day personal, 2000/day Google Workspace — hard ceiling
API key in query parameter option — avoid URL logging with key exposed
Gmail OAuth required separately for email sending — multi-layer auth
CAN-SPAM compliance required — unsubscribe handling is automatic
Cold email legality varies by country — implement jurisdiction-appropriate consent

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. CAN-SPAM and GDPR compliant. US data residency. API key auth with Gmail OAuth for sending. Gmail API access is privileged — implement minimal scope OAuth. Prospect PII requires data retention policy. Bootstrapped indie product — limited enterprise security certifications.
